## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Monograph's product strategy, customer segments, and content marketing priorities for Q3 2023.](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Monograph is prioritizing three key areas for Q3: new feature releases (including AI integration), engineering-focused content, and developing the "Monograph Method"](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Core differentiators are ease-of-use and industry-specific features, summarized as "designed for architects by architects"](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Key pain points for customers include project financial management, invoicing, and handling paused projects](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Content strategy should balance addressing specific use cases with targeting high-volume search terms](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

## Topics

### Q3 Product Strategy

  - [Three main focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
    1.  New feature releases (including AI integration)
    2.  Engineering-focused content
    3.  Developing the "Monograph Method"
  - [Staggered approach: July for new features, August for engineering content, September for Monograph Method](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Aim to position Monograph as an AI-enabled project management solution for architects](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)

### Core Product Features

  - [Project Overview: Visual Gantt-style chart showing all projects in one view](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [MoneyGantt: Unique feature visualizing project finances across stages (budgeted, time spent, invoiced, paid)](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Invoicing: Addresses major pain point of billing for long-term projects (avg. 18 months, $100k)](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2866.0)

### Customer Segments and Use Cases

  - [Primary users: Architectural firms, varying from disengaged principals to hands-on managers](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Key use cases:](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
    1.  Project creation and proposal building (AI-enabled)
    2.  Staff allocation and availability tracking
    3.  Financial management across multiple long-term projects
    4.  Handling paused projects (25-30% of projects typically on pause)

### Content Strategy

  - [Balance between addressing specific use cases and targeting high-volume search terms](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Opportunity to create dedicated pages for unique features (e.g., MoneyGantt)](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [Leverage existing case studies, particularly those with metrics (e.g., Brooks and Scarpa, Workbench, Woodhull, Garrison)](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Develop content around the "Monograph Method" - best practices tied to product features](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### SEO and CRO Considerations

  - [Current top-performing content: "Best project management software for architects" blog post](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Opportunity to optimize landing pages for search, not just blog content](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Consider AEO (AI Engine Optimization) tactics, such as incorporating customer testimonials and feature highlights on landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop a rigid content plan based on the insights from this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Review existing website design for low-hanging fruit SEO/CRO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Prioritize creating content around engineering terms to align with Robert's goals](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to repurpose existing case studies and unpublished customer interviews](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=2610.0)
  - [Investigate the performance of current CTA forms and optimize accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/Kg6DVAqTVAzYsr4toTg4QGqTBQDifn5m?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
